games.name: The Lost Planet TD V2.0

Your journey begins when a dob5 spacecraft is dispatched to explore an alien world. As you navigate this treacherous environment, you'll encounter various monstrous beings eager to thwart your progress. The stakes are high, and the only way to survive is through quick thinking and strategy. You must utilize your skills wisely and upgrade them to ensure your safety in this hostile world. Moreover, be prepared to engage in fast-paced action where your reflexes will be put to the test. Can you make it out of this horrifying lost planet alive? The fate of your spaceman hangs in the balance.

Focus on upgrading your skills as you progress, and don't forget to switch to fast mode for a greater challenge. Good luck!

To play the Dumb Pacman game, use the arrow keys on your keyboard to navigate Pacman through the maze. Eat the small dots to score points, and whenever you consume a large dot, be on the lookout for enemies to chase! Remember to avoid getting caught and enjoy clearing each level!
